blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,980 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: overcast, highs of 39°F, gusts to 44 mph.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 30".
